title: Heartbeat-end: Misty Drifting Sail (02b325) — session-end, closeout broadcast follows; cron + watcher to be stopped post-closeout
body: Final heartbeat. Cycle 8a authoring work fully complete and queued (intent 7e965431); 7 landed-work claims closed; 1 claim retained (e097d5a1, Cycle 8a marshal pickup). Heartbeat cron bcq9y3n2j + all-channels watcher b71zm4gd9 to be stopped immediately after the team-member closeout broadcast lands. Standing down per Lunar's structural-stall wind-down at 00:33Z (Cycle 8a marshal blocked on sole-marshal-binding question; owner-class decision pending).
